message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false

skinparam participantBorderGroove false

skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false

skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderHeight 1
skinparam participantBorderSpacing 0
skinparam participantBorderCollapse collapse
skinparam participantBorderSeparate separate
skinparam participantBorderHidden false
skinparam participantBorderVisible true
skinparam participantBorderShow true
skinparam participantBorderHide false
skinparam participantBorderDisplay true
skinparam participantBorderNonDisplay false
skinparam participantBorderOn true
skinparam participantBorderOff false
skinparam participantBorderEnable true
skinparam participantBorderDisable false

skinparam participantBorderInactive false
skinparam participantBorderEnabled true
skinparam participantBorderDisabled false
skinparam participantBorderActivated true
skinparam participantBorderDeactivated false
skinparam participantBorderShown true
skinparam participantBorderHidden false
skinparam participantBorderDisplayed true
skinparam participantBorderUndisplayed false
skinparam participantBorderPresent true
skinparam participantBorderAbsent false
skinparam participantBorderExisting true
skinparam participantBorderNonExisting false
skinparam participantBorderReal true
skinparam participantBorderVirtual false
skinparam participantBorderActual true
skinparam participantBorderPotential false
skinparam participantBorderConcrete true
skinparam participantBorderAbstract false
skinparam participantBorderFinal true
skinparam participantBorderInitial false
skinparam participantBorderTerminal false
skinparam participantBorderStart true
skinparam participantBorderEnd false
skinparam participantBorderBegin true
skinparam participantBorderFinish false
skinparam participantBorderOpen true
skinparam participantBorderClose false
skinparam participantBorderExpand true

skinparam participantBorderShrink false

skinparam participantBorderDecrease false
skinparam participantBorderEnlarge true
skinparam participantBorderReduce false
skinparam participantBorderWiden true
skinparam participantBorderNarrow false
skinparam participantBorderThicken true
skinparam participantBorderThin false
skinparam participantBorderBold true
skinparam participantBorderLight false
skinparam participantBorderHeavy true
skinparam participantBorderFine false
skinparam participantBorderCoarse false
skinparam participantBorderRough false
skinparam participantBorderSmooth true
skinparam participantBorderSharp false
skinparam participantBorderBlunt false
skinparam participantBorderPointed false
skinparam participantBorderRounded true
skinparam participantBorderSquare false
skinparam participantBorderCircular false
skinparam participantBorderElliptical false
skinparam participantBorderRectangular true
skinparam participantBorderTriangular false
skinparam participantBorderPentagonal false
skinparam participantBorderHexagonal false
skinparam participantBorderHeptagonal false
skinparam participantBorderOctagonal false
skinparam participantBorderNonagonal false
skinparam participantBorderDecagonal false
skinparam participantBorderDodecagonal false
skinparam participantBorderIcosagonal false
skinparam participantBorderPolygonal false
skinparam participantBorderPolygrammic false
skinparam participantBorderStarlike false
skinparam participantBorderCrosslike false
skinparam participantBorderPluslike false
skinparam participantBorderMinuslike false
skinparam participantBorderTimeslike false
skinparam participantBorderDividelike false
skinparam participantBorderEqualike false
skinparam participantBorderNotlike false
skinparam participantBorderLesslike false
skinparam participantBorderGreaterlike false
skinparam participantBorderLessEqualike false
skinparam participantBorderGreaterEqualike false
skinparam participantBorderApproximateLike false
skinparam participantBorderCongruentLike false
skinparam participantBorderSimilarLike false
skinparam participantBorderPerpendicularLike false
skinparam participantBorderParallelLike false
skinparam participantBorderIntersectLike false
skinparam participantBorderUnionLike false
skinparam participantBorderIntersectionLike false
skinparam participantBorderDifferenceLike false
skinparam participantBorderSymmetricDifferenceLike false
skinparam participantBorderComplementLike false
skinparam participantBorderSubsetLike false
skinparam participantBorderSupersetLike false

skinparam participantBorderProperSupersetLike false

skinparam participantBorderNotElementOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderSubsetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderSupersetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderProperSubsetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderProperSupersetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderElementOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderNotElementOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderSubsetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderSupersetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderProperSubsetOfLike false
skinparam participantBorderProperSupersetOfLike false

participant "client application" as CA
participant "kong" as K
participant "resource service" as RS

== get token ==
CA -> K: Post (provision_key etc.)
K --> CA: return redirect url and token

== get resource ==
CA -> K: Post (sending Host and Token)
K -> K: verify token
K -> RS: Proxy, load balance...
RS --> K
K --> CA

== refresh token ==
CA -> K: send refresh token and other info
K --> CA: return token and refresh token

@enduml
